calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Northridge Cooperative Homes, Inc. is present. Represented by Kevin Barr.
Attorney David Briggs appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jasmine Faulalo and Janella Siaopo are present.
Attorney Kela Shang representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steven Collier, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of SEP-17-2012 is vacated.
